TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Courtney_Alexander, title = Courtney_Alexander, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Courtney_Alexander} }

S.FORM: == Courtney Alexander == 4 bulad 27 demiad, 1977 a mihca, Courtney Alexander, miunduay. Courtney Alexander nalecuhan i Bridgeport, Connecticut, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza, u misimaw zikuzay mimaliay. Courtney Alexander i 2000 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 13, namapili' tu nu Orlando Magic putiput. kakuniza
S.PHON: == ¶ourtn…ô ar~…æ…ô*and…ôr == * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, ¶ourtn…ô ar~…æ…ô*and…ôr, miunduaj. ¶ourtn…ô ar~…æ…ô*and…ôr nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i bridg…ôport, ¶onn…ô ¶ti ¶ut, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza, u misimaw zikuzaj mimar~…æiaj. ¶ourtn…ô ar~…æ…ô*and…ôr i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu orr~…æando magi ¶ putiput. kakuniza
S.FORM: == Courtney Alexander == 4 bulad 27 demiad, 1977 a mihca, Courtney Alexander, miunduay. Courtney Alexander nalecuhan i Bridgeport, Connecticut, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza, u misimaw zikuzay mimaliay. Courtney Alexander i 2000 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 13, namapili' tu nu Orlando Magic putiput. kakuniza
